analysis.seasonal_notes: Seasonal patterns detected in Google Trends data. Likely peaks during: (1) Holiday seasons (Dec-Jan) for resort/tourism searches, (2) Summer vacation (Apr-May) for family visits, (3) Post-monsoon (Oct-Nov) for property investment decisions. Rising queries for resorts and healthcare suggest year-round lifestyle interest beyond seasonal tourism. Recommend seasonal content calendar targeting resort searches in Q4 and investment content in Q3-Q4.
